name: Motor XL 500k xs 200k
description: Example: 10 motor claims through a 500k xs 200k Excess-of-Loss layer
icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24'><defs><linearGradient id='g' x1='0' y1='0' x2='1' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#2196F3'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#1565C0'/></linearGradient></defs><rect width='24' height='24' rx='5' fill='url(#g)'/><path d='M4 18h16M4 14h12M4 10h8M4 6h4' stroke='#fff' stroke-width='1.8' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>

content.name: Motor XL 500k xs 200k
content.description: Excess-of-Loss layer: claims between 200k and 700k are partially or fully ceded. Claims below 200k are retained. Claims above 700k are ceded at the 500k limit.
